Title: Minimalist Color Block House Ornament - Watercolor Keepsake
Description:
Celebrate the simple beauty of modern design with this charming watercolor ornament. Featuring a clean, geometric, color-blocked house design, this piece adds a touch of sophisticated, minimalist charm to any holiday decor.

The watercolor medium gives the design a soft, artisanal, and hand-painted feel, making every ornament unique. The cool, serene blue background complements the gentle pastel hues of the house structure (yellow, lavender, soft white, and slate blue accents), creating a visually calming and modern centerpiece.

  • Material & Craftsmanship: Printed on high-quality, durable material with a watercolor finish, capturing the delicate beauty of painting.
  • Design Style: Perfect for modern farmhouse, scandinavian, or minimalist decor themes. The abstract geometric design is effortlessly stylish.
  • Gift Idea: Makes a thoughtful and unique gift for new homeowners, architecture enthusiasts, or anyone who appreciates contemporary art.
  • Display: Comes ready to hang with a gold-tone glitter ornament hanger, suitable for Christmas trees, wreaths, or display shelves.

Add a touch of wearable art to your holiday traditions. This ornament is a wonderful keepsake that captures the essence of simple elegance.
